title: Marutake
description: kk-marutake.co.jp zoominfo.com/c/marutake/561552308 Marutake Co., Ltd. is a comprehensive pharmaceutical and medical wholesale company founded on June 15, 1925, and headquartered in Niigata City, Japan, with a 100-year history of connecting manufacturers to healthcare providers across the region. The company distributes prescription pharmaceuticals, medical devices, clinical diagnostic reagents, hygiene materials, nursing care products, and healthcare IT systems to hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies, primarily across Niigata, Yamagata, Miyagi, Akita, Tokyo, and Gunma prefectures. With a workforce of 477 employees and capital of ¥100 million, Marutake positions itself as a "supporter of the medical frontline," ensuring stable supply of essential medical commodities to local communities
